name: TWICE-BAKED SWEET POTATOES with WINTER SALSA

ingredients.item: ¼ teaspoon allspice berries, toasted and ground
ingredients.original: ¼ teaspoon allspice berries, toasted and ground

ingredients.item: 4 fuyu persimmons, peeled, seeded, and finely diced
ingredients.original: 4 fuyu persimmons, peeled, seeded, and finely diced

ingredients.item: 1 jalapeño chile, roasted, seeded, and diced
ingredients.original: 1 jalapeño chile, roasted, seeded, and diced

ingredients.item: 1 scallion, white and green parts, thinly sliced
ingredients.original: 1 scallion, white and green parts, thinly sliced

ingredients.item: 6 sweet potatoes (about 8 ounces each), scrubbed and patted dry
ingredients.original: 6 sweet potatoes (about 8 ounces each), scrubbed and patted dry

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon coconut oil, plus more for oiling
ingredients.original: 1 tablespoon coconut oil, plus more for oiling

ingredients.item: ¼ cup freshly squeezed orange juice
ingredients.original: ¼ cup freshly squeezed orange juice

ingredients.item: ¼ teaspoon finely grated orange zest
